mapper.sql: fa.id, fa.application_case_id, fa.fit_score, fa.matched_skills, fa.missing_skills, fa.recommended_study, fa.recommended_certificates, fa.strategy, fa.source_snapshot, fa.score_basis, fa.gap_recommendations, fa.certificate_recommendations, fa.strategy_actions, fa.condition_matrix, fa.analysis_confidence, fa.apply_decision, fa.model, fa.prompt_version, fa.status, fa.error_message, fa.created_at, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.posting_date, ac.status AS application_status, ac.is_favorite, ac.updated_at AS application_updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.archived_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id ) ORDER BY ac.is_favorite DESC, fa.created_at DESC, fa.id DESC

SELECT
FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.id = #{applicationCaseId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fa.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT ja.id AS job_analysis_id, ja.job_posting_id, ja.job_posting_revision, ja.created_at AS job_analysis_created_at, up.id AS user_profile_id, up.updated_at AS profile_updated_at, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ja.required_skills, ja.preferred_skills, ja.duties, up.skills AS profile_skills, up.certificates AS profile_certificates, up.desired_job FROM application_case ac LEFT JOIN job_analysis ja ON ja.id = (SELECT MAX(j.id) FROM job_analysis j WHERE j.application_case_id = ac.id) LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON up.user_id = ac.user_id WHERE ac.id = #{applicationCaseId} AND ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fit_analysis (application_case_id, fit_score, matched_skills, missing_skills, recommended_study, recommended_certificates, strategy, source_snapshot, score_basis, gap_recommendations, certificate_recommendations, strategy_actions, condition_matrix, analysis_confidence, apply_decision, model, prompt_version, status, error_message) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{fitScore}, #{matchedSkills}, #{missingSkills}, #{recommendedStudy}, #{recommendedCertificates}, #{strategy}, #{sourceSnapshot}, #{scoreBasis}, #{gapRecommendations}, #{certificateRecommendations}, #{strategyActions}, #{conditionMatrix}, #{analysisConfidence}, #{applyDecision}, #{model}, #{promptVersion}, #{status}, #{errorMessage})

INSERT INTO fit_analysis_history (fit_analysis_id, application_case_id, previous_score, new_score, diff_summary) VALUES (#{fitAnalysisId}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{previousScore}, #{newScore}, #{diffSummary})

INSERT INTO fit_analysis_condition_match (fit_analysis_id, condition_text, condition_type, match_status, evidence, severity, sort_order) VALUES (#{fitAnalysisId}, #{row.condition}, #{row.conditionType}, #{row.matchStatus}, #{row.evidence}, #{severity}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.id = #{applicationCaseId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY fa.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fit_analysis_learning_task (fit_analysis_id, skill, title, practice_task, expected_duration, priority, sort_order) VALUES (#{fitAnalysisId}, #{skill}, #{title}, #{practiceTask}, #{expectedDuration}, #{priority}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fit_analysis_learning_task WHERE fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId} ORDER BY completed ASC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fit_analysis_gate_result (fit_analysis_id, gate_status, needs_human_review, reason_count, max_severity, gate_reasons_json, evidence_gate_version, rag_runtime_enabled, rewrite_applied) VALUES (#{fitAnalysisId}, #{gateStatus}, #{needsHumanReview}, #{reasonCount}, #{maxSeverity}, #{gateReasonsJson}, #{evidenceGateVersion}, #{ragRuntimeEnabled}, #{rewriteApplied})
INSERT INTO fit_analysis_evidence_source (fit_analysis_id, source_type, user_owned, item_count, items_json) VALUES (#{fitAnalysisId}, #{sourceType}, #{userOwned}, #{itemCount}, #{itemsJson})
mapper.select: SELECT id, fit_analysis_id, gate_status, needs_human_review, reason_count, max_severity, gate_reasons_json, evidence_gate_version, rag_runtime_enabled, rewrite_applied, created_at FROM fit_analysis_gate_result WHERE fit_analysis_id = #{fitAnalysisId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_usage_log (user_id, application_case_id, feature_type, status, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, token_usage, credit_used, error_message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{featureType}, #{status}, #{model}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{tokenUsage}, #{creditUsed}, #{errorMessage})
